accurate.why: What it says about the reports/OMB provision is accurate, but it summarizes only Title III of the enacted bill text.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated claims, though it omits the bill's main content.

states_purpose.why: States only the reports-reduction purpose; misses the bill's primary kids-online-safety/privacy purpose entirely.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Accurately describes the title 31 budget-justification changes it covers.

exceptions_conditions.why: Notes the two-agency/OMB condition for the reports provision.

effective_dates.why: No dates stated for the covered provision.

major_provisions_covered.why: Omits Titles I and II (kids online safety, COPPA expansion), the bill's core; covers only Title III.

judged_via: claude-opus-4-8 via parallel Claude Code subagents (full bill text, web/knowledge-verified)
